top3.sql:
SELECT s.School, s.Street
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY sa.AvgScrMath DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6;

SELECT s.School, s.Street || ' ' || s.City || ', ' || s.State || ' ' || s.Zip AS postal_address
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY sa.AvgScrMath DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6;

final.sql:
SELECT s.School, s.Street
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY sa.AvgScrMath DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6;
